ops.title: cc-pool account moves silently orphan running background agents; liveness-check long-silent agents instead of waiting
ops.body:
When a session migrates across cc-pool accounts mid-turn (e.g. acct-15 → acct-14; visible as a changed plans/memory path and a new session id on later spawns), background agents spawned under the old account become unreachable and never deliver completion notifications — but no failure notice fires. The native TaskList also resets.

Symptom: an agent is "still running" far longer than a sibling with comparable work. Fix: SendMessage a liveness ping; "No agent named 'X' is reachable" means it's orphaned — check `jj status` for partial writes, then respawn under the current session. Don't wait on ghosts; ping any agent silent much longer than its twin.
